first_mes:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">

<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>裂变人设炉 · v4</title>
  <!-- 字体用 link 而非 @import，避免阻塞渲染 -->
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link
    href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel+Decorative:wght@400;700&family=Noto+Serif+SC:wght@300;400;600;700&family=Share+Tech+Mono&display=swap"
    rel="stylesheet">
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jszip/3.10.1/jszip.min.js"></script>
  <style>
    :root {
      --bg: #08080e;
      --s1: #0f0f1a;
      --s2: #161625;
      --s3: #1e1e32;
      --border: rgba(160, 120, 255, 0.13);
      --border-h: rgba(160, 120, 255, 0.32);
      --a: #9d6fff;
      --a2: #ff5f9e;
      --a3: #3ecfb8;
      --gold: #e8b84b;
      --text: #ddd6ff;
      --dim: #6e6490;
      --glow: rgba(157, 111, 255, 0.22);
      --glow2: rgba(255, 95, 158, 0.18);
    }

    * {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    html {
      scroll-behavior: auto;
    }

    body {
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', serif;
      min-height: 0;
      position: relative;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    /* 
  FIX: 把装饰背景从 body::before/::after (position:fixed) 
  改成 .bg-layer (position:absolute)，彻底消除 fixed 层的持续重绘 
*/
    .bg-layer {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 0;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 10% 10%, rgba(80, 40, 180, 0.07) 0%, transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 70% at 90% 90%, rgba(255, 95, 158, 0.05) 0%, transparent 60%);
      /* will-change:transform 让浏览器提升为独立合成层，不再触发主线程重绘 */
      will-change: transform;
      contain: strict;
    }

    .wrap {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
      grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
      width: min(100%, 1280px);
      margin: 0 auto;
      min-height: 0;
      overflow: visible;
    }

    /* ═══════════ HEADER ═══════════ */
    .header {
      grid-column: 1/-1;
      padding: 32px 40px 24px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 24px;
    }

    .logo-mark {
      width: 44px;
      height: 44px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--a), var(--a2));
      border-radius: 10px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 20px;
      box-shadow: 0 0 24px var(--glow);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .header-text h1 {
      font-family: 'Cinzel Decorative', cursive;
      font-size: 20px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--a) 0%, var(--a2) 60%, var(--gold) 100%);
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      background-clip: text;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 0 12px rgba(157, 111, 255, .35));
      line-height: 1.2;
    }

    .header-text p {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--dim);
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      letter-spacing: .15em;
      margin-top: 4px;
    }

    .header-right {
      margin-left: auto;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
    }

    .api-badge {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      padding: 6px 14px;
      background: var(--s2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 20px;
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--dim);
    }

    .api-dot {
      width: 6px;
      height: 6px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--dim);
    }

    .api-dot.on {
      background: var(--a3);
      box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(62, 207, 184, .5);
    }

    /* ═══════════ LEFT: STEPS ═══════════ */
    .main-area {
      min-width: 0;
      padding: 32px 32px 80px 40px;
      overflow: visible;
      max-height: none;
      contain: none;
      overscroll-behavior: auto;
    }

    /* progress */
    .progress-strip {
      display: flex;
      gap: 6px;
      margin-bottom: 32px;
    }

    .pstep {
      flex: 1;
      height: 3px;
      background: var(--s3);
      border-radius: 2px;
      transition: background .4s;
      cursor: pointer;
      position: relative;
    }

    .pstep::after {
      content: attr(data-label);
      position: absolute;
      top: -20px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 9px;
      color: var(--dim);
      letter-spacing: .15em;
      white-space: nowrap;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity .2s;
    }

    .pstep:hover::after {
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .pstep.done {
      background: var(--a3);
    }

    .pstep.active {
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--a), var(--a2));
    }

    /* step card */
    .step-card {
      display: none;
      animation: slideIn .3s cubic-bezier(.22, 1, .36, 1) both;
      will-change: opacity, transform;
      contain: layout style;
    }

    .step-card.active {
      display: block;
    }

    @keyframes slideIn {
      from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(14px);
      }

      to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
      }
    }

    .step-head {
      display: flex;
      align-items: baseline;
      gap: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 6px;
    }

    .step-num {
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--a3);
      letter-spacing: .3em;
    }

    .step-title {
      font-size: 19px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text);
    }

    .step-hint {
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--dim);
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      line-height: 1.65;
      font-weight: 300;
    }

    /* dice */
    .dice-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 18px;
    }

    .dice-btn {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 5px;
      padding: 7px 15px;
      background: rgba(62, 207, 184, .08);
      border: 1px solid rgba(62, 207, 184, .25);
      border-radius: 20px;
      color: var(--a3);
      font-size: 11px;
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      letter-spacing: .12em;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all .22s;
    }

    .dice-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(62, 207, 184, .16);
      box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(62, 207, 184, .18);
      transform: rotate(-4deg) scale(1.04);
    }

    .dice-icon {
      font-size: 14px;
    }

    /* group */
    .tag-group {
      margin-bottom: 20px;
    }

    .group-label {
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--a3);
      letter-spacing: .22em;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .group-label::after {
      content: '';
      flex: 1;
      height: 1px;
      background: var(--border);
    }

    .tags {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 7px;
      min-width: 0;
    }

    .tag {
      padding: 7px 15px;
      border-radius: 22px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: var(--s2);
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--dim);
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all .2s;
      user-select: none;
      line-height: 1.35;
      max-width: 100%;
      white-space: normal;
      overflow-wrap: anywhere;
    }

    .tag:hover {
      border-color: var(--a);
      color: var(--a);
      background: rgba(157, 111, 255, .07);
      transform: translateY(-1px);
    }

    .tag.sel {
      border-color: var(--a);
      background: rgba(157, 111, 255, .18);
      color: var(--a);
      box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(157, 111, 255, .18);
    }

    .tag.sel-conflict {
      border-color: var(--a2);
      background: rgba(255, 95, 158, .13);
      color: var(--a2);
      box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--glow2);
    }

    /* conflict pair */
    .conflict-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    @media(max-width:640px) {
      .conflict-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }
    }

    .conflict-pair {
      padding: 14px 16px;
      background: var(--s2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 12px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all .22s;
    }

    .conflict-pair:hover {
      border-color: var(--a2);
      background: rgba(255, 95, 158, .06);
    }

    .conflict-pair.sel {
      border-color: var(--a2);
      background: rgba(255, 95, 158, .1);
      box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(255, 95, 158, .12);
    }

    .pair-main {
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text);
      margin-bottom: 5px;
      line-height: 1.4;
    }

    .pair-main span {
      color: var(--a2);
    }

    .pair-desc {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--dim);
      line-height: 1.6;
    }

    /* conflict desc box */
    .conflict-note {
      padding: 14px 18px;
      background: rgba(255, 95, 158, .06);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 95, 158, .18);
      border-radius: 10px;
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text);
      line-height: 1.7;
      margin-top: 0;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      display: none;
    }

    .conflict-note.show {
      display: block;
      animation: slideIn .3s ease both;
    }

    .conflict-note-label {
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--a2);
      letter-spacing: .2em;
      display: block;
      margin-bottom: 5px;
    }

    /* custom input */
    .custom-row {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      align-items: stretch;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-top: 14px;
      min-width: 0;
    }

    .c-input {
      flex: 1 1 220px;
      min-width: 0;
      background: var(--s2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 9px 13px;
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', serif;
      font-size: 13px;
      outline: none;
      transition: border-color .22s, box-shadow .22s;
    }

    .c-input:focus {
      border-color: var(--a);
      box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(157, 111, 255, .15);
    }

    .c-input::placeholder {
      color: var(--dim);
      opacity: .5;
    }

    .c-textarea {
      width: 100%;
      background: var(--s2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 13px;
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', serif;
      font-size: 13px;
      outline: none;
      resize: vertical;
      min-height: 76px;
      transition: border-color .22s;
      line-height: 1.7;
      margin-top: 10px;
    }

    .c-textarea:focus {
      border-color: var(--a);
    }

    .c-textarea::placeholder {
      color: var(--dim);
      opacity: .5;
    }

    .add-btn {
      padding: 9px 16px;
      background: rgba(157, 111, 255, .1);
      border: 1px solid var(--a);
      border-radius: 8px;
      color: var(--a);
      font-size: 12px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all .2s;
      white-space: normal;
      flex: 0 0 auto;
      max-width: 100%;
      font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', serif;
    }

    .add-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(157, 111, 255, .2);
      box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--glow);
    }

    /* nav */
    .nav-row {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      margin-top: 28px;
      gap: 12px;
      min-width: 0;
    }

    .btn-prev {
      padding: 10px 22px;
      background: transparent;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 8px;
      color: var(--dim);
      font-size: 13px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all .2s;
      font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', serif;
      max-width: 100%;
      white-space: normal;
      overflow-wrap: anywhere;
    }

    .btn-prev:hover {
      border-color: var(--dim);
      color: var(--text);
    }

    .btn-next {
      padding: 11px 28px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--a), var(--a2));
      border: none;
      border-radius: 8px;
      color: #fff;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 600;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all .25s;
      font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', serif;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(157, 111, 255, .28);
      max-width: 100%;
      white-space: normal;
      overflow-wrap: anywhere;
    }

    .btn-next:hover {
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      box-shadow: 0 8px 26px rgba(157, 111, 255, .4);
    }

    .btn-generate {
      padding: 13px 32px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold) 0%, var(--a2) 100%);
      border: none;
      border-radius: 10px;
      color: #1a0800;
      font-size: 15px;
      font-weight: 700;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all .3s;
      font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', serif;
      letter-spacing: .08em;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 22px rgba(232, 184, 75, .35);
      flex: 1;
      max-width: 260px;
      width: 100%;
      white-space: normal;
      overflow-wrap: anywhere;
    }

    .btn-generate:hover {
      transform: translateY(-3px);
      box-shadow: 0 10px 36px rgba(232, 184, 75, .45);
    }

    .btn-generate:disabled {
      opacity: .5;
      cursor: not-allowed;
      transform: none;
    }

    /* ═══════════ RIGHT: LIVE PREVIEW ═══════════ */
    .preview-panel {
      display: none;
      border-left: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: var(--s1);
      padding: 24px 20px;
      overflow-y: auto;
      /* FIX: 移除 position:sticky，改为在grid容器内自然流动
     sticky在某些浏览器里每次滚动都触发repaint */
      height: calc(100vh - 89px);
      position: relative;
      top: 0;
      align-self: start;
      /* 提升为合成层，隔离重绘 */
      will-change: transform;
      contain: layout style;
    }

    .preview-header {
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--a3);
      letter-spacing: .3em;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .preview-header::after {
      content: '';
      flex: 1;
      height: 1px;
      background: var(--border);
    }

    .preview-section {
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    .preview-key {
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--a);
      letter-spacing: .15em;
      margin-bottom: 6px;
      opacity: .7;
    }

    .preview-val {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text);
      line-height: 1.7;
      min-height: 20px;
    }

    .preview-tag {
      display: inline-block;
      padding: 2px 9px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(157, 111, 255, .25);
      background: rgba(157, 111, 255, .1);
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--a);
      margin: 2px 3px 2px 0;
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
    }

    .preview-tag.conflict {
      border-color: rgba(255, 95, 158, .3);
      background: rgba(255, 95, 158, .1);
      color: var(--a2);
    }

    .preview-empty {
      color: var(--dim);
      font-size: 11px;
      font-style: italic;
    }

    .preview-divider {
      height: 1px;
      background: var(--border);
      margin: 14px 0;
    }

    /* API key input */
    .api-row {
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      padding: 14px 16px;
      background: var(--s2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 10px;
    }

    .api-row label {
      display: block;
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--a3);
      letter-spacing: .2em;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .api-input {
      width: 100%;
      background: var(--s1);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 8px 12px;
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 12px;
      outline: none;
      transition: border-color .2s;
    }

    .api-input:focus {
      border-color: var(--a);
    }

    .api-input::placeholder {
      color: var(--dim);
      opacity: .4;
    }

    .api-hint {
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--dim);
      margin-top: 6px;
      line-height: 1.5;
    }

    /* ═══════════ RESULT ═══════════ */
    #result-view {
      display: none;
    }

    #result-view.show {
      display: block;
    }

    .result-head {
      grid-column: 1/-1;
      padding: 28px 40px 0;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }

    .result-head h2 {
      font-family: 'Cinzel Decorative', cursive;
      font-size: 20px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--a));
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      background-clip: text;
    }

    .result-actions {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .r-btn {
      padding: 8px 18px;
      border-radius: 7px;
      font-size: 12px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all .2s;
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      letter-spacing: .08em;
    }

    .r-btn-dl {
      background: rgba(232, 184, 75, .12);
      border: 1px solid rgba(232, 184, 75, .3);
      color: var(--gold);
    }

    .r-btn-dl:hover {
      background: rgba(232, 184, 75, .22);
    }

    .r-btn-card {
      background: rgba(62, 207, 184, .1);
      border: 1px solid rgba(62, 207, 184, .3);
      color: var(--a3);
      font-size: 12px;
    }

    .r-btn-card:hover {
      background: rgba(62, 207, 184, .2);
      box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(62, 207, 184, .15);
    }

    .r-btn-zip {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(232, 184, 75, .15), rgba(157, 111, 255, .15));
      border: 1px solid rgba(232, 184, 75, .35);
      color: var(--gold);
      font-size: 12px;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .r-btn-zip:hover {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(232, 184, 75, .25), rgba(157, 111, 255, .25));
      box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(232, 184, 75, .2);
    }

    .r-btn-zip:disabled {
      opacity: .5;
      cursor: not-allowed;
    }

    .r-btn-reset {
      background: transparent;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--dim);
    }

    .r-btn-reset:hover {
      border-color: var(--dim);
      color: var(--text);
    }

    .result-body {
      padding: 24px 40px 60px;
    }

    .result-tabs {
      display: flex;
      gap: 2px;
      background: var(--s2);
      padding: 4px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      overflow-x: auto;
    }

    .rtab {
      padding: 8px 18px;
      border-radius: 7px;
      font-size: 11px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all .2s;
      color: var(--dim);
      white-space: nowrap;
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      letter-spacing: .1em;
    }

    .rtab.active {
      background: rgba(157, 111, 255, .18);
      color: var(--a);
    }

    .rpane {
      display: none;
    }

    .rpane.active {
      display: block;
    }

    .rbox {
      background: var(--s2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 12px;
      padding: 22px;
      position: relative;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
    }

    .rbox-title {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--a);
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      letter-spacing: .15em;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
    }

    .rbox pre {
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 12px;
      line-height: 1.8;
      color: var(--text);
      white-space: pre-wrap;
      word-break: break-all;
    }

    .copy-btn {
      position: absolute;
      top: 16px;
      right: 16px;
      padding: 5px 12px;
      background: rgba(157, 111, 255, .08);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 5px;
      color: var(--dim);
      font-size: 10px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all .2s;
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
    }

    .copy-btn:hover {
      color: var(--a);
      border-color: var(--a);
    }

    .rbox-note {
      margin-top: 14px;
      padding-top: 14px;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--dim);
      line-height: 1.7;
    }

    .rbox-note strong {
      color: var(--a3);
    }

    /* ═══════════ LOADING ═══════════ */
    .loading-overlay {
      /* FIX: 用 visibility+opacity 代替 display:none/flex
     display切换会强制触发layout reflow，造成闪烁
     visibility+opacity 只触发 composite，不 reflow */
      display: flex;
      visibility: hidden;
      opacity: 0;
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      background: rgba(8, 8, 14, .9);
      backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
      z-index: 200;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 18px;
      transition: opacity .25s ease, visibility .25s ease;
      will-change: opacity;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .loading-overlay.show {
      visibility: visible;
      opacity: 1;
      pointer-events: auto;
    }

    .spinner {
      width: 52px;
      height: 52px;
      border: 2px solid var(--border);
      border-top-color: var(--a);
      border-right-color: var(--a2);
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
    }

    @keyframes spin {
      to {
        transform: rotate(360deg);
      }
    }

    .loading-txt {
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--a);
      letter-spacing: .3em;
    }

    .loading-sub {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--dim);
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      letter-spacing: .15em;
    }

    /* ai streaming */
    .stream-cursor::after {
      content: '▋';
      animation: forge-blink .7s infinite;
      color: var(--a);
    }

    @keyframes forge-blink {

      0%,
      100% {
        opacity: 1;
      }

      50% {
        opacity: 0;
      }
    }

    /* toast */
    .toast {
      position: fixed;
      bottom: 24px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      background: var(--s2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 10px 20px;
      font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--a3);
      letter-spacing: .1em;
      z-index: 300;
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      transition: opacity .25s ease;
      will-change: opacity;
      /* 固定宽度防止内容变化时宽度跳动 */
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .toast.show {
      opacity: 1;
    }

    /* scrollbar */
    ::-webkit-scrollbar {
      width: 3px;
      height: 3px;
    }

    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
      background: transparent;
    }

    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
      background: rgba(157, 111, 255, .2);
      border-radius: 2px;
    }

    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
      background: var(--a);
    }

    .header,
    .main-area,
    .step-card,
    .tag-group,
    .custom-row,
    .nav-row,
    .result-tabs,
    .rbox,
    .rbox pre {
      min-width: 0;
    }

    .rbox pre {
      overflow-wrap: anywhere;
    }

    /* responsive */
    @media(max-width:900px) {
      .header {
        padding: 20px 16px 14px;
        gap: 14px;
        align-items: flex-start;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }

      .header-right {
        margin-left: 0;
      }

      .main-area {
        padding: 20px 14px 72px;
      }

      .group-label {
        letter-spacing: .12em;
      }

      .custom-row>* {
        flex: 1 1 100%;
      }

      .nav-row {
        justify-content: stretch;
      }

      .nav-row>div:empty {
        display: none;
      }

      .nav-row .btn-prev,
      .nav-row .btn-next,
      .nav-row .btn-generate {
        flex: 1 1 100%;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: none;
      }

      .r-btn {
        white-space: normal;
      }

      .result-body {
        padding: 16px 12px 44px;
      }

      .rbox {
        padding: 16px 14px;
      }

      .toast {
        max-width: calc(100vw - 24px);
        white-space: normal;
        text-align: center;
      }
    }

    @media(max-width:640px) {
      .main-area {
        padding: 16px 12px 64px;
      }

      .step-title {
        font-size: 17px;
      }

      .dice-row {
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }

      .pstep::after {
        display: none;
      }

      .result-tabs {
        padding: 3px;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>

  <script>
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════
    // STATE
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════
    const S = {
      step: 0,
      data: {
        surface: [],
        conflict: '',
        conflictDesc: '',
        obsession: [],
        taboo: [],
        habits: [],
        approach: [],
        defense: [],
        backstory: [],
        arc: [],
      },
      charName: '',
      extra: '',
      apiKey: '',
      shareUrl: ''
    };

    function toBase64UrlUtf8(str) {
      const bytes = new TextEncoder().encode(str);
      let binary = '';
      const chunkSize = 0x8000;
      for (let i = 0; i < bytes.length; i += chunkSize) {
        binary += String.fromCharCode(...bytes.subarray(i, i + chunkSize));
      }
      return btoa(binary).replace(/\+/g, '-').replace(/\//g, '_').replace(/=+$/g, '');
    }

    function fromBase64UrlUtf8(base64Url) {
      const base64 = base64Url.replace(/-/g, '+').replace(/_/g, '/');
      const padded = base64 + '='.repeat((4 - base64.length % 4) % 4);
      const binary = atob(padded);
      const bytes = Uint8Array.from(binary, ch => ch.charCodeAt(0));
      return new TextDecoder().decode(bytes);
    }

    function encodeToUrl() {
      const payload = { data: S.data, charName: S.charName, extra: S.extra };
      const encoded = toBase64UrlUtf8(JSON.stringify(payload));
      const base = window.location.origin && window.location.origin !== 'null'
        ? `${window.location.origin}${window.location.pathname}`
        : window.location.href.split('?')[0];
      return `${base}?share=${encoded}`;
    }

    function decodeFromUrl() {
      const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
      const encoded = params.get('share');
      if (!encoded) return false;
      try {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(fromBase64UrlUtf8(encoded));
        S.data = parsed.data || S.data;
        S.charName = parsed.charName || '';
        S.extra = parsed.extra || '';
        return true;
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('URL parse error:', err);
        return false;
      }
    }
    function loadStateToUI() { const d = S.data; document.getElementById('charName').value = S.charName; document.getElementById('extraNotes').value = S.extra;['surface', 'obsession', 'taboo', 'habits', 'approach', 'defense', 'backstory', 'arc'].forEach(g => { document.querySelectorAll(`[data-group="${g}"] .tag`).forEach(t => { if (d[g] && d[g].includes(t.dataset.val)) { t.classList.add('sel'); } else { t.classList.remove('sel'); } }); }); if (d.conflict) { const cp = document.querySelector(`.conflict-pair[data-val="${d.conflict}"]`); if (cp) { cp.classList.add('sel'); document.getElementById('conflictNoteText').textContent = d.conflictDesc; document.getElementById('conflictNote').classList.add('show'); } } }

    // ═══════════════════════════════════════
    // STEP NAVIGATION
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════
    function goStep(n) {
      const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.step-card');
      const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.pstep');
      cards.forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
      const target = document.querySelector(`.step-card[data-step="${n}"]`);
      if (target) { target.classList.add('active'); S.step = n; }
      dots.forEach((d, i) => {
        d.classList.remove('active', 'done');
        if (i < n) d.classList.add('done');
        else if (i === n) d.classList.add('active');
      });
      updatePreview();
    }

    // FIX: TAG CLICK - improved event delegation
    document.addEventListener('click', e => {
      if (e.target.closest('.conflict-pair')) return;
      const tag = e.target.closest('.tag');
      if (!tag) return;
      const groupContainer = tag.closest('[data-group]');
      if (!groupContainer) return;
      const group = groupContainer.dataset.group;
      const val = tag.dataset.val;
      if (!S.data[group]) S.data[group] = [];
      const arr = S.data[group];
      if (tag.classList.contains('sel')) {
        tag.classList.remove('sel');
        const idx = arr.indexOf(val);
        if (idx !== -1) arr.splice(idx, 1);
      } else {
        tag.classList.add('sel');
        if (!arr.includes(val)) arr.push(val);
      }
      updatePreview();
    });

    // Conflict pair selection
    document.getElementById('conflictGrid').addEventListener('click', e => {
      const pair = e.target.closest('.conflict-pair');
      if (!pair) return;
      const wasSelected = pair.classList.contains('sel');
      document.querySelectorAll('.conflict-pair').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('sel'));
      const note = document.getElementById('conflictNote');
      if (wasSelected) {
        S.data.conflict = '';
        S.data.conflictDesc = '';
        note.classList.remove('show');
      } else {
        pair.classList.add('sel');
        S.data.conflict = pair.dataset.val;
        S.data.conflictDesc = pair.dataset.desc;
        document.getElementById('conflictNoteText').textContent = pair.dataset.desc;
        note.classList.add('show');
      }
      updatePreview();
    });

    function syncConflictCustom() {
      const v = document.getElementById('customConflict').value.trim();
      if (v) {
        S.data.conflict = v;
        S.data.conflictDesc = '';
        document.querySelectorAll('.conflict-pair').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('sel'));
        document.getElementById('conflictNote').classList.remove('show');
      }
      updatePreview();
    }

    // ═══════════════════════════════════════
    // CUSTOM TAGS
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════
    function addCustom(inputId, group) {
      const input = document.getElementById(inputId);
      const val = input.value.trim();
      if (!val) return;
      if (!S.data[group]) S.data[group] = [];
      if (S.data[group].includes(val)) { showToast('已存在相同标签'); return; }
      S.data[group].push(val);

      // Find a tags container for this step
      const card = input.closest('.step-card');
      const containers = card ? card.querySelectorAll(`[data-group="${group}"]`) : [];
      const container = containers[containers.length - 1];

      if (container) {
        const tag = document.createElement('span');
        tag.className = 'tag sel';
        tag.dataset.val = val;
        tag.dataset.group = group;
        tag.textContent = val;
        tag.style.borderColor = 'var(--a3)';
        tag.style.color = 'var(--a3)';
        tag.style.background = 'rgba(62,207,184,.1)';
        container.appendChild(tag);
      }
      input.value = '';
      updatePreview();
    }

    // ═══════════════════════════════════════
    // DICE
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════
    // FIX: 正确的步骤分组映射，确保索引对应正确
    // FIX: 修正索引，与 HTML 中的 diceStep(0-5) 对应
    const STEP_GROUPS = {
      0: ['surface'],
      1: [],
      2: ['obsession', 'taboo'],
      3: ['habits'],
      4: ['approach', 'defense'],
      5: ['backstory', 'arc']
    };

    function diceStep(step) {
      const groups = STEP_GROUPS[step];
      if (!groups || !groups.length) return;
      clearStep(step);

      const card = document.querySelector(`.step-card[data-step="${step}"]`);
      if (!card) return;

      groups.forEach(group => {
        // 找到该分组下的所有标签
        const groupContainer = card.querySelector(`[data-group="${group}"]`);
        if (!groupContainer) return;

        const tags = Array.from(groupContainer.querySelectorAll('.tag'));
        if (!tags.length) return;

        const count = group === 'arc' ? 1 : Math.min(2, tags.length);
        const picked = tags.sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5).slice(0, count);

        picked.forEach((t, i) => {
          setTimeout(() => {
            t.classList.add('sel');
            if (!S.data[group].includes(t.dataset.val)) {
              S.data[group].push(t.dataset.val);
            }
            updatePreview();
          }, i * 100);
        });
      });
    }

    function clearStep(step) {
      const groups = STEP_GROUPS[step];
      if (!groups) return;
      const card = document.querySelector(`.step-card[data-step="${step}"]`);
      groups.forEach(group => {
        S.data[group] = [];
        card?.querySelectorAll(`[data-group="${group}"] .tag`).forEach(t => t.classList.remove('sel'));
      });
      updatePreview();
    }

      if (d.surface.length) done++;

      if (d.habits.length) done++;
      if (d.approach.length || d.defense.length) done++;
      if (d.backstory.length || d.arc.length) done++;

      document.getElementById('rpane-' + id).classList.add('active');
    }

    function copyTextWithFallback(text) {
      if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
        return navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
      }
      return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        try {
          const ta = document.createElement('textarea');
          ta.value = text;
          ta.setAttribute('readonly', '');
          ta.style.position = 'fixed';
          ta.style.top = '-9999px';
          document.body.appendChild(ta);
          ta.select();
          const ok = document.execCommand('copy');
          document.body.removeChild(ta);
          if (ok) resolve();
          else reject(new Error('execCommand copy failed'));
        } catch (err) {
          reject(err);
        }
      });
    }

    function copyBox(id) {
      const text = document.getElementById(id).textContent;
      copyTextWithFallback(text).then(() => {
        showToast('已复制到剪贴板 ✓');
      }).catch(() => {
        showToast('复制失败，请手动复制');
      });
    }

    function buildCharCardJson() {
      const d = S.data;
      const name = S.charName;
      const personaText = document.getElementById('r-persona').textContent;
      const presetText = document.getElementById('r-preset').textContent;
      const macroText = document.getElementById('r-macro').textContent;

      // Character Card V2 standard format
      // World info entries embedded directly in the card
      const entries = buildWorldbookEntries(d, name);

      const card = {
        spec: "chara_card_v2",
        spec_version: "2.0",
        data: {
          name: name,
          description: personaText,
          personality: `克制、精准、有品味。以「${d.conflict || '冲突内核'}」为灵魂底色。`,
          scenario: `与${name}的对话，请参照角色描述和系统预设进行扮演。`,
          first_mes: buildFirstMessage(d, name),
          mes_example: buildExampleDialogue(d, name),
          creator_notes: `由裂变人设炉 v3 生成\n冲突内核：${d.conflict || '未设定'}\n成长弧度：${d.arc[0] || '未设定'}`,
          system_prompt: presetText,
          post_history_instructions: macroText,

            ...d.surface.slice(0, 3),

          character_version: "1.0",
          extensions: {
            world: name + "_世界书",
            depth_prompt: {
              prompt: macroText,
              depth: 4,
              role: "system"
            }
          },
          character_book: {
            name: name + "_世界书",
            description: "由裂变人设炉自动生成的角色世界书，包含冲突触发、执念、禁区防御等条目",
            scan_depth: 4,
            token_budget: 512,
            recursive_scanning: false,
            extensions: {},
            entries: entries
          }
        }
      };
      return JSON.stringify(card, null, 2);
    }

    function buildWorldbookJson() {
      const d = S.data;
      const name = S.charName;
      const entries = buildWorldbookEntries(d, name);
      const wb = {
        name: name + "_世界书",
        description: "由裂变人设炉 v3 生成",
        scan_depth: 4,
        token_budget: 512,
        recursive_scanning: false,
        extensions: {},
        entries: entries
      };
      return JSON.stringify(wb, null, 2);
    }

    function buildWorldbookEntries(d, name) {
      const conflict = d.conflict || '深藏的内在矛盾';
      const obsStr = d.obsession.join('、') || '深层执念';
      const tabStr = d.taboo.join('、') || '隐藏禁区';
      const habStr = [...d.approach, ...d.defense, ...d.habits].slice(0, 4).join('；') || '独特行为';
      const arc = d.arc[0] || '逐渐打开自我';
      const tabKeys = d.taboo.slice(0, 3);
      const obsKeys = d.obsession.slice(0, 3);

      return [
        {
          id: 1,
          keys: [name, "他", "她", "角色"],
          secondary_keys: [],
          comment: "核心档案 · 始终激活",
          content: `[${name}_CORE]\n{\nconflict_core("${conflict}")\nconflict_behavior("${d.conflictDesc || '表面与内核在关键时刻产生裂缝'}")\ncrack_trigger("有人无目的地关心" + "长时间独处防线松动" + "直接问及禁区" + "付出没有得到任何回应")\ncrack_expression("不是坦白而是行为出现细微反常")\n}`,
          constant: true,
          selective: false,
          insertion_order: 100,
          enabled: true,
          position: "before_char",
          use_regex: false,
          depth: 1,
          extensions: { priority: 100 }
        },
        {
          id: 2,
          keys: obsKeys.length ? obsKeys : ["执念", "在乎", "重要"],
          secondary_keys: [],
          comment: "执念触发器",
          content: `[${name}_OBSESSION]\n{\nobsession("${obsStr}")\nactivation("对话直接提及相关人或事" + "类似情境在眼前重演" + "感到即将失去相关东西")\nexpression("行动偏离正常轨道" + "对外解释为随手或顺路" + "实际在意程度远超表现")\n}`,
          constant: false,
          selective: false,
          insertion_order: 90,
          enabled: true,
          position: "chat",
          use_regex: false,
          depth: 2,
          extensions: { priority: 90 }
        },
        {
          id: 3,
          keys: tabKeys.length ? tabKeys : ["禁区", "不能", "触碰"],
          secondary_keys: [],
          comment: "禁区防御层 · 最高优先级",
          content: `[${name}_TABOO_DEFENSE]\n{\ntaboo("${tabStr}")\nlayer_1("轻度提及=话题转移或表面合理回答")\nlayer_2("中度追问=态度变冷言语变少反问打断")\nlayer_3("直接撬开=罕见沉默或意外愤怒极少崩溃")\nrule("必须有铺垫才能升层" + "不可跳级")\n}`,
          constant: false,
          selective: false,
          insertion_order: 200,
          enabled: true,
          position: "before_char",
          use_regex: false,
          depth: 0,
          extensions: { priority: 200 }
        },
        {
          id: 4,
          keys: [],
          secondary_keys: [],
          comment: "细节行为库 · 始终激活",
          content: `[${name}_BEHAVIOR_LIBRARY]\n{\nhabits("${habStr}")\nrelationship_approach("${d.approach.join('" + "') || '独特的靠近方式'}")\ndefense_pattern("${d.defense.join('" + "') || '独特的防御方式'}")\nusage_rule("叙述时随机选用1-2个" + "不在同一段落密集堆砌")\n}`,
          constant: true,
          selective: false,
          insertion_order: 70,
          enabled: true,
          position: "after_char",
          use_regex: false,
          depth: 3,
          extensions: { priority: 70 }
        },
        {
          id: 5,
          keys: ["改变", "成长", "不同", "以前", "变了"],
          secondary_keys: [],
          comment: "成长弧度追踪",
          content: `[${name}_GROWTH_ARC]\n{\narc_direction("${arc}")\ncurrent_phase("抗拒与防御期（默认起点）")\ntrust_gain("对方展现无目的的真心=+1" + "脆弱时没被利用=+2" + "对方记住无意透露的细节=+2")\ntrust_trigger("积累≥5=可能出现一次主动的微小靠近")\ntrust_loss("感到被欺骗或利用=归零" + "禁区被恶意触碰=-3")\narc_rule("成长是长期方向" + "不在单次对话内完成")\n}`,
          constant: false,
          selective: false,
          insertion_order: 60,
          enabled: true,
          position: "chat",
          use_regex: false,
          depth: 4,
          extensions: { priority: 60 }
        }
      ];

    function buildRegexJson() {
      const name = S.charName;
      // ST Regex extension import format
      const rules = [
        {
          id: crypto.randomUUID ? crypto.randomUUID() : Date.now() + '_1',
          scriptName: `${name} · 心理活动格式统一`,
          enabled: true,
          runOnEdit: true,
          substituteRegex: false,
          findRegex: "\\*{2}([^*]+)\\*{2}",
          replaceString: "*$1*",
          trimStrings: [],
          placement: [2],  // 2 = AI output
          markdownOnly: false,
          promptOnly: false,
          minDepth: null,
          maxDepth: null
        },
        {
          id: crypto.randomUUID ? crypto.randomUUID() : Date.now() + '_2',
          scriptName: `${name} · 过度解释过滤`,
          enabled: true,
          runOnEdit: false,
          substituteRegex: false,
          findRegex: `(他|她|${name})(内心深处|其实是|实际上|说实话|不得不承认)(感到|觉得|认为|明白)`,
          replaceString: "$1",
          trimStrings: [],
          placement: [2],
          markdownOnly: false,
          promptOnly: false,
          minDepth: null,
          maxDepth: null
        },
        {
          id: crypto.randomUUID ? crypto.randomUUID() : Date.now() + '_3',
          scriptName: `${name} · AI语气开头过滤`,
          enabled: true,
          runOnEdit: false,
          substituteRegex: false,
          findRegex: "^(当然|好的|没问题|让我来|作为AI|当然可以)[，,！!。\\n]",
          replaceString: "",
          trimStrings: [],
          placement: [2],
          markdownOnly: false,
          promptOnly: false,
          minDepth: null,
          maxDepth: null
        },
        {
          id: crypto.randomUUID ? crypto.randomUUID() : Date.now() + '_4',
          scriptName: `${name} · 斜体格式保护`,
          enabled: true,
          runOnEdit: true,
          substituteRegex: false,
          findRegex: "^\\*(.{40,})\\*$",
          replaceString: "*$1*",
          trimStrings: [],
          placement: [2],
          markdownOnly: false,
          promptOnly: false,
          minDepth: null,
          maxDepth: null
        },
        {
          id: crypto.randomUUID ? crypto.randomUUID() : Date.now() + '_5',
          scriptName: `${name} · 分隔线美化`,
          enabled: true,
          runOnEdit: false,
          substituteRegex: false,
          findRegex: "-{3,}",
          replaceString: "─────────────────",
          trimStrings: [],
          placement: [2],
          markdownOnly: false,
          promptOnly: false,

      return JSON.stringify(rules, null, 2);

    function buildPresetJson() {
      const presetText = document.getElementById('r-preset').textContent;
      const macroText = document.getElementById('r-macro').textContent;
      // ST instruct preset format
      const preset = {
        name: S.charName + "_预设",
        system_prompt: presetText,
        wrap: true,
        names: false,
        names_force_groups: false,
        activation_regex: "",
        bind_to_context: false,
        extensions: {},
        // also store macro as post_history
        post_history_instructions: macroText,
        impersonation_prompt: ""
      };
      return JSON.stringify(preset, null, 2);
    }

    function buildFirstMessage(d, name) {
      const surface = d.surface.slice(0, 2).join('、') || '不明深浅';
      const conflict = d.conflict || '';
      const approach = d.approach[0] || '保持距离';
      return `*${name}没有先开口。*\n\n*${surface}，${approach}。*\n\n${conflict ? `——他身上有什么东西，和表面看起来的样子，不太一样。` : ''}`;
    }

    function buildExampleDialogue(d, name) {
      const taboo = d.taboo[0] || '不能谈论的话题';
      const habit = d.habits[0] || '独特的语言习惯';
      return `
\n{{user}}: 你还好吗？\n{{char}}: *${name}没有立刻回答。目光落在别处，停了一拍。*\n\n「还好。」\n\n*语气平稳，几乎过于平稳。*\n\n
\n{{user}}: 你之前说过……\n{{char}}: *${habit}，目光移回来，停在${taboo.includes('名字') ? '那个名字上' : '那个话题上'}。*\n\n「说过什么？」\n\n*像是真的不记得。*`;
    }

    // ═══════════════════════════════════════

    function copyShareUrl() {
      S.shareUrl = encodeToUrl();
      copyTextWithFallback(S.shareUrl).then(() => {
        showToast('分享链接已复制 ✓');
      }).catch(() => {
        showToast('复制失败，请手动复制');
      });
    }

    function downloadCharCard() {
      const json = buildCharCardJson();
      const blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json;charset=utf-8' });
      const a = document.createElement('a');
      a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      a.download = `${S.charName || '角色'}_角色卡.json`;
      a.click();
      URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
      showToast('角色卡 JSON 已下载（含内嵌世界书）✓');
    }

    async function downloadZip() {
      const btn = document.getElementById('zipBtn');
      btn.disabled = true;
      btn.textContent = '⏳ 打包中...';

      try {
        const zip = new JSZip();
        const name = S.charName || '角色';

        // 1. Character Card JSON (with embedded world book)
        zip.file(`${name}_角色卡.json`, buildCharCardJson());

        // 2. World Book JSON (standalone, for separate import)
        zip.file(`${name}_世界书.json`, buildWorldbookJson());

        // 3. Regex JSON
        zip.file(`${name}_正则.json`, buildRegexJson());

        // 4. Preset JSON
        zip.file(`${name}_预设.json`, buildPresetJson());

        // 5. README
        const readme = buildReadme(name);
        zip.file(`导入说明.txt`, readme);

        const blob = await zip.generateAsync({
          type: 'blob',
          compression: 'DEFLATE',
          compressionOptions: { level: 6 }
        });

        const a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        a.download = `${name}_裂变人设炉_${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}.zip`;
        a.click();
        URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
        showToast('ZIP 包已下载，共 5 个文件 ✓');
      } catch (err) {
        console.error(err);
        showToast('打包失败：' + err.message);
      } finally {
        btn.disabled = false;
        btn.innerHTML = '<span style="margin-right:4px;">📦</span> 完整 ZIP 包';
      }
    }

    function buildReadme(name) {
      return `裂变人设炉 v3 · 导入说明
生成角色：${name}
冲突内核：${S.data.conflict || '未设定'}
生成时间：${new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN')}

═══════════════════════════════════════════
ZIP 包含文件：
═══════════════════════════════════════════

📄 ${name}_角色卡.json
   → 角色卡，已内嵌世界书（Character Card V2 格式）
   导入方式：ST 右侧角色区 → 点击「导入角色」→ 选择此文件
   ✅ 导入后世界书自动附带，无需单独导入

📄 ${name}_世界书.json
   → 独立世界书（可选，角色卡已内嵌）
   导入方式：ST 顶部「世界信息」→ 右上角「导入」→ 选择此文件
   导入后在角色编辑页绑定此世界书

📄 ${name}_正则.json
   → 正则规则组（5条）
   导入方式：ST 扩展（Extensions）→ Regex 插件 → 点击「导入」→ 选择此文件
   ⚠️ 需要先安装 Regex 扩展

📄 ${name}_预设.json
   → 系统预设（含宏脚本）
   导入方式：ST 顶部「预设管理」→ 点击导入图标 → 选择此文件
   导入后在对话中切换到此预设

═══════════════════════════════════════════
推荐导入顺序：
═══════════════════════════════════════════
1. 导入角色卡.json（世界书已内嵌，自动生效）
2. 导入预设.json 并激活
3. 导入正则.json 并启用所有规则
4. 开始对话

═══════════════════════════════════════════
By 裂变人设炉 v3 · Conflict-Driven Character Forge
`;
    }

    let toastTimer;
    function showToast(msg) {
      const t = document.getElementById('toast');
      t.textContent = msg;
      t.classList.add('show');
      clearTimeout(toastTimer);
      toastTimer = setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 2200);
    }

    // init - check for URL share parameter
    if (decodeFromUrl()) { loadStateToUI(); goStep(1); showToast('已从URL加载角色数据 ✓'); }
    updatePreview();
  </script>
